{"cards": [{"name": "Emberforge Warrior", "mana_cost": "{1}{R}", "cmc": 2, "colors": ["R"], "color_identity": ["R"], "type_line": "Creature — Human Warrior", "oracle_text": "Haste
Menace", "flavor_text": "The forge fires burn in her eyes and fuel her relentless charge.", "power": "2", "toughness": "1", "loyalty": null, "rarity": "common", "design_notes": "Simple aggressive creature with two relevant keywords. 2/1 for 2 with haste and menace follows common power level guidelines - aggressive stats with evasion but fragile. Menace makes it harder to block while haste enables immediate pressure."}, {"name": "Inferno Tyrant", "mana_cost": "{4}{R}{R}", "cmc": 6, "colors": ["R"], "color_identity": ["R"], "type_line": "Creature — Dragon", "oracle_text": "Flying, trample
When ~ enters, it deals 4 damage to each opponent.
{2}{R}: ~ gets +3/+0 until end of turn.", "flavor_text": "Its breath turns kingdoms to ash, its wings eclipse the sun.", "power": "6", "toughness": "4", "loyalty": null, "rarity": "mythic", "design_notes": "Splashy mythic dragon with immediate board impact and activated ability for reach. The ETB ability provides guaranteed value, while the pump ability creates decision points and enables lethal attacks. 6/4 flying trample for 6 mana is powerful but fair for mythic level."}, {"name": "Verdant Pilgrimage", "mana_cost": "{1}{G}", "cmc": 2, "colors": ["G"], "color_identity": ["G"], "type_line": "Sorcery", "oracle_text": "Search your library for a basic land card, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle.", "flavor_text": "The ancient paths still remember the way to sacred groves.", "power": null, "toughness": null, "loyalty": null, "rarity": "common", "design_notes": "Clean land search effect at common. Gets a basic to hand rather than directly into play to avoid complexity issues. 2 mana cost is fair for hand ramp that fixes mana and provides card advantage. Standard templating for library search effects."}, {"name": "Ironbark Behemoth", "mana_cost": "{4}{G}{G}", "cmc": 6, "colors": ["G"], "color_identity": ["G"], "type_line": "Creature — Beast", "oracle_text": "Trample", "flavor_text": "It moves through the forest like a living avalanche, unstoppable and thunderous.", "power": "8", "toughness": "6", "loyalty": null, "rarity": "common", "design_notes": "Large common creature that tests the upper bounds of common P/T. 8/6 for 6 mana follows the CMC+3 guideline (6+3=9, P+T=14 exceeds slightly but trample-only justifies it). Single keyword keeps complexity low while trample makes the large body relevant."}, {"name": "Primal Awakening", "mana_cost": "{2}{G}", "cmc": 3, "colors": ["G"], "color_identity": ["G"], "type_line": "Enchantment — Aura", "oracle_text": "Enchant land
Enchanted land has "{T}: Add {G}{G}."
At the beginning of your upkeep, if enchanted land is untapped, you may search your library for a basic land card, put it onto the battlefield tapped, then shuffle.", "flavor_text": null, "power": null, "toughness": null, "loyalty": null, "rarity": "uncommon", "design_notes": "Multi-ability aura that provides mana acceleration and land ramp. The upkeep trigger creates interesting decisions about tapping the land vs. getting more lands. Requires the land to be untapped to balance the powerful effect. Tests both Aura templating and triggered ability complexity appropriate for uncommon."}]}
